name: Cargo Truck: Transport &amp; Hunt
description: Are you ready for a wild adventure with Cargo Truck: Transport &amp; Hunt, a simulation game that combines driving and hunting? The zoo animals have escaped and you are the only one who can catch them! Drive your truck across the city and use your sniper gun to hunt down the animals, from leopards to elephants. But be careful, they are fast and furious! You have to bring them back to the zoo safely and quickly. Cargo Truck: Transport &amp; Hunt is a game that will challenge your skills and nerves. Don&rsquo;t miss this exciting game! Have fun!
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
tags: 3D, Animal, Boys, Gun, Shooting, Sniper, Truck
